No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to poverty eradication.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course includes practical application of 'BMI計算' (BMI calculator) app development, which indirectly promotes health monitoring and well-being, aligning with Target 3.4.
